answer: The top 10 Texas state agencies by total 2024 expenditures are led by the Texas Department of Transportation with 2,281 expenditures, followed by the Parks & Wildlife Department with 1,882, and the Health and Human Services Commission with 1,750. Other agencies in the top 10 include the Texas Workforce Commission (1,409), Texas Department of Criminal Justice (1,393), Office of the Attorney General (1,290), Texas Department of Public Safety (1,250), Department of Family & Protective Services (1,226), Department of State Health Services (1,004), and Department of Agriculture (954).
